overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a character walking through a rainy neon-lit city at night. The journey transitions from a covered sidewalk alongside modern glass architecture, through an indoor parking garage with green industrial lighting, and back to an outdoor palm-lined street with elevated highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban sidewalk with modern storefronts

events.description: futuristic red six-wheeled car drives past on the wet street to the right
character approaches the entrance to the indoor parking garage ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-slicked covered sidewalk, passing pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: woman with yellow umbrella walking toward the camera
red futuristic car with six wheels driving past on the wet road

entered.detail: tall futuristic structure with reflective glass facade and vertical lines
overhead shelter extending from the building creating a covered pedestrian walkway
modern illuminated lamp post with rectangular light fixture
rain-slicked pavement reflecting the street lights and building illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a futuristic city, walking along a covered sidewalk beside a modern glass building. The wet pavement reflects the ambient neon and street lighting. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk in the opposite direction, and a distinctive red six-wheeled car passes by on the adjacent street. The camera approaches the entrance to an indoor parking structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor parking garage with vehicle lanes and industrial lighting

events.description: character walks through automatic glass doors entering the indoor parking garage from the covered sidewalk
futuristic vehicles drive through the parking structure on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking into the enclosed parking garage, transitioning from the rainy exterior to the green-lit interior

notable_agents.action: person with purple umbrella walking ahead into the garage interior

entered.detail: exposed industrial ceiling with metal beams and green fluorescent lighting
metal and concrete lane dividers separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle lanes
long fluorescent tube lights emitting a distinct greenish glow throughout the structure

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into an enclosed parking garage with industrial green lighting and concrete construction. The character walks past concrete barriers separating the pedestrian path from vehicle lanes. The modern glass building from the previous segment is now visible only as a distant facade through the entrance. The environment is artificially lit with long fluorescent tubes, and a few pedestrians with umbrellas continue walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street lined with palm trees and elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: character exits the parking garage back into the open air, revealing palm trees and highway overpasses
multiple futuristic cars drive past on the wet multi-lane road to the right
digital quest marker appears on screen indicating game objective location ahead

agents.ego_description: leaving the parking garage and continuing along the palm-lined sidewalk in the rain, approaching a busy intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sports car driving along the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: tall tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk in planters
massive curved elevated highway structure with support pillars spanning across the street
building facade with horizontal wooden or metal slats behind the palm trees
illuminated sign with colorful text and graphics mounted on the building

segments.scene_description: The character exits the garage into an open urban street lined with palm trees and dominated by a massive elevated highway overpass in the distance. The environment is exposed to the rain again, with wet pavement reflecting the streetlights. Futuristic vehicles drive along the multi-lane road, and the architecture shifts to buildings with horizontal slatted facades. A digital billboard and game interface element become visible as the character continues down the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy futuristic city, transitioning from a sleek glass corridor into an industrial garage before emerging onto an open urban boulevard. It begins on a covered sidewalk where wet pavement reflects neon lights and a red six-wheeled car passes by, moving steadily toward the mouth of a parking structure. As the camera enters the garage, the atmosphere shifts to a concrete environment bathed in artificial green fluorescent lighting, with the previous glass architecture receding into a distant facade. The scene then opens back up to the rainy night as the character exits the structure, moving past palm trees toward a massive elevated highway overpass. Finally, the environment expands into a wide street featuring buildings with slatted facades and glowing digital billboards as futuristic vehicles stream along the multi-lane road.
